violations.text: Beverage bottles were observed stored on the floor in the storage and kitchen area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the toaster, freezer, and refrigerator have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

The floor in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
